scenarios.title: Data Orchestration and Parallel Computing
scenarios.when_to_read: Distributed Python runtime tasks, parallel task and actor graphs, Ray clusters, Ray Data pipelines, Train/Tune experiments, Serve deployments, or scalable reinforcement-learning workloads.
scenarios.role: Use `ray` for Ray-specific distributed Python, cluster operations, data processing, training/tuning, serving, and RLlib workflows.
scenarios.read_when: The task names Ray, ray, ray.remote, Ray Core, Ray Data, Ray Train, Ray Tune, Ray Serve, RLlib, ObjectRef, actor, task, ray job, runtime_env, ray status, serve deploy, Tuner, TuneConfig, PPOConfig, AlgorithmConfig, or asks to scale Python/data/ML/RL work across CPUs, GPUs, nodes, jobs, or Serve replicas.
scenarios.best_for: Ray package usage: task/actor code, cluster CLI and Jobs, runtime environment packaging, Data loading/transforms, Train/Tune checkpointed experiments and hyperparameter sweeps, Serve YAML/application deployment, and RLlib AlgorithmConfig/Gymnasium workflows.
scenarios.avoid_when: Use a generic PyTorch, Dask, Airflow, Kubernetes, cloud-provider, FastAPI, or reinforcement-learning package skill when the request is not using Ray APIs or Ray-managed execution. Use a repo maintenance scenario if the user is editing Ray source internals rather than using Ray as a library.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `ray` when Ray owns the runtime, data pipeline, training/tuning orchestration, serving layer, cluster/job lifecycle, or RLlib algorithm environment. For overlapping requests, choose `ray` if the solution depends on Ray APIs such as `ray.init`, `ray.remote`, `ray.data`, `ray.train`, `ray.tune`, `ray.serve`, `ray.rllib`, Ray CLI, Jobs, or runtime environments.

scenarios.title: Reinforcement Learning Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: RLlib reinforcement-learning tasks involving AlgorithmConfig, PPOConfig, Gymnasium environments, EnvRunner/Learner scaling, Tune sweeps, RLlib checkpoints, or multi-agent/offline RL routing.
scenarios.role: Use `ray` for RLlib-specific reinforcement-learning workflows that run on Ray and integrate with Ray Tune.
scenarios.read_when: The task names RLlib, ray.rllib, PPOConfig, AlgorithmConfig, EnvRunner, Learner, Gymnasium custom env registration for Ray, multi-agent RL with Ray, RLlib checkpoint/evaluation, or RLlib Tune sweeps.
scenarios.best_for: Configuring, validating, and troubleshooting RLlib workloads, especially PPO/custom Gymnasium envs, config-only checks, and Ray Tune integration.
scenarios.avoid_when: Use another RL package skill for Stable-Baselines3, CleanRL, Tianshou, PettingZoo-only environments, or generic RL scripts that do not use Ray RLlib.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `ray` for reinforcement-learning tasks only when RLlib or Ray-managed rollout/training execution is central; otherwise choose the more specific non-Ray RL skill.
